programmes.show_description: One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques! Always good value and quality.
Join Paul for a Creative Groovi Hour! Watch as he crafts beautiful parchment designs using the Groovi system - perfect for adding a personal touch to your handmade projects.
One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques! Always good value and quality.
Don't miss the Brother Masterclass - packed with incredible offers on top-quality machines and must-have accessories for every maker!
Join us for an hour of fun, insprations and deals from some of your favourite crafting brands.

We're kicking off the show today with an hour of beautiful Susan Wheeler Fabrics!
Sandra Rushton is back on Sewing Street with an hour of Sanntangle.
Steffi Stern is back on Sewing Street with beautiful needle felting kits from The Makerss!
Join Sandra Rushton for a second hour of Sanntangle.
Celebrate National Pet Day with creative projects for your furry friends - discover easy makes your pets will love.
Based in the UK, AALL & Create is your one stop shop for mixed media inspiration and essentials.
Introducing The Ultimate Alphabet! Elegantly designed from exclusively hand drawn artwork. Perfect for all occasions, from birthday and get well to retirement and sympathy.
Based in County Durham Crafter's Companion strives to create products to make crafting easier, more enjoyable, and beautifully rewarding. Tune in to find out what's new!

...Collection: An hour of Sanderson Art of the Garden Collection.
Carolyn Forster will be bringing us the brand new Rose Star Quilt pattern using the brand new Whimsical Fields fabric collection.
Stuart Hillard takes us through his must-have tools... From handy gadgets to essential accessories, these picks make every project easier and more enjoyable.
...Quilt: Carolyn Forster will be back with a brand new quilt pattern Disappearing Nine Patch Plaid Quilt in beautiful colourways.
Juey Jumbo is back on Sewing Street!
Debbi Moore returns to HobbyMaker to offer some for the digital (and analogue) crafter.
Explore the Portobello binder, alongside a beautiful range of custom inserts and planner accessories. Sharon shows how you can organise time and tasks with this functional tool.
Add a little extra fun to your messages with Hunkydory's new Pop-Out Swing Cards - designed to surprise and delight.

From a humble needlecraft shop in 1990 to one of the UK's leading papercraft manufacturers, Hunkydory provides quality and quantity for new and established crafters alike.
